scripts.install:all: npm install && cd ai-workspace-backend && npm install && cd ../ai-workspace-frontend && npm install
scripts.build:all: cd ai-workspace-backend && npm run build && cd ../ai-workspace-frontend && npm run build
scripts.setup: cp ai-workspace-backend/.env.example ai-workspace-backend/.env && cp ai-workspace-frontend/.env.local.example ai-workspace-frontend/.env.local
